publishedAbstract: - noobaa pv-pool backingstore throwing `NO_CAPACITY` error- noobaa pv-pool backingstore is in `REJECTED` phase ~~~ 1m56s Warning BackingStorePhaseRejected backingstore/--backing-store Backing store mode: NO_CAPACITY 2h46m Warning LOW_CAPACITY bucketclass/-bucket-class LOW_CAPACITY 1m36s Warning RejectedBackingStore bucketclass/-bucket-class NooBaa BackingStore "loki-backing-store" is in rejected phase ~~~ **Related Articles:** [How to Scale Out (Add More Pods/PVC Volumes) to a NooBaa PV-Pool Backingstore OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7066818) [Configure Lifecycle Policies on Noobaa/RGW buckets](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7114687) [Defining retention for logs in LokiStack on RHOCP 4](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7053212)
publishedTitle: Expanding the NooBaa PV-Pool Backingstore in ODF
